title: L-THEANINE
description: L-Theanine is an amino acid found primarily in tea leaves that promotes relaxation without sedation. It increases alpha brain waves, enhances focus when combined with caffeine, and supports calm, clear-headed mental states.

research.title: l-Theanine: An astounding sui generis integrant in tea
research.summary: L-theanine offers potential health benefits including anti-stress and neuroprotective effects with modulation of anti-neoplastic agents.

research.title: L-Theanine and Immunity: A Review
research.summary: L-theanine enhances immune function, reduces immunosuppression, and serves as an immunomodulator for inflammation management.

research.title: l-Theanine Activates the Browning of White Adipose Tissue Through the AMPK Axis and Ameliorates Diet-Induced Obesity
research.summary: L-theanine triggers white adipose tissue browning and reduces diet-induced obesity by enhancing thermogenesis.

research.title: l-Theanine reduces psychological and physiological stress responses
research.summary: L-theanine intake decreases stress responses through inhibition of cortical neuron excitation during acute stress.

research.title: L-theanine: an astounding sui generis amino acid in poultry nutrition
research.summary: L-theanine demonstrates antioxidant, growth-promoting, immune-boosting, and anti-stress benefits in poultry applications.

research.title: L-theanine relieves symptoms in patients with schizophrenia: an 8-week, randomized, double-blind study
research.summary: L-theanine augmentation of antipsychotic therapy improves positive, activation, and anxiety symptoms in schizophrenia.

research.title: l-Theanine regulates glucose, lipid, and protein metabolism via insulin and AMP-activated protein kinase signaling
research.summary: L-theanine regulates metabolism in rats through insulin and AMPK signaling mechanisms.

research.title: Psychotropic effects of L-theanine and its clinical properties
research.summary: L-theanine demonstrates promising therapeutic potential for managing anxiety disorders and stress.

research.title: L-theanine in the adjunctive treatment of generalized anxiety disorder
research.summary: L-theanine showed limited efficacy for anxiety reduction but may improve sleep satisfaction in those with insomnia symptoms.

research.title: An overview of biological production of L-theanine
research.summary: Bacterial enzymes demonstrate potential for producing L-theanine for human health and food applications.

sentiment.summary: Widely praised for its calming effects without drowsiness. The combination with caffeine is a popular starting nootropic stack. Very well-tolerated with minimal side effects.

effects.label: Caffeine Synergy:
effects.description: Most popular use is with caffeine for focused energy.

sideEffects.label: Possible Drowsiness:
sideEffects.description: At high doses, some may feel sleepy.

sideEffects.label: Drug Interactions:
sideEffects.description: Minimal; generally safe with most substances.

availability.label: Widely Available:
availability.description: Found in almost all supplement stores.

availability.label: Very Affordable:
availability.description: One of the most cost-effective nootropics.

availability.label: Multiple Forms:
availability.description: Capsules, powder, and in many pre-made stacks.
